Title: Internal Feedback Survey
FeedbackText: The deployment workflow is smoother than before, but error messages are still hard to understand.

Title: Internal Feedback Survey
FeedbackText: Content approval cycles feel overly complex and slow down campaign execution.

Title: Internal Feedback Survey
FeedbackText: Dashboard performance has improved, but data refresh timing is sometimes unreliable.

Title: Internal Feedback Survey
FeedbackText: I feel supported by my manager, though cross-team collaboration could be better.

FeedbackText: Expense reporting is clearer now, but manual steps still remain.

FeedbackText: Sprint commitments are often too aggressive, leading to burnout.

FeedbackText: There is a strong sense of ownership within the team, which I really value.

Title: Internal Feedback Survey

FeedbackText: The internal API documentation is outdated and makes onboarding harder.

Title: Internal Feedback Survey
FeedbackText: Flexible working policies are appreciated and well communicated.
